summary: Prior repository identity loss is resolved: the bootstrap lock uses the Git common directory itself, shared within one repository and isolated across sibling repositories.
inspection_summary: Compared Story, Architecture, Spec, Test Plan, implementation, real separate-git-dir regression, and current-head 42/42 plus 55/55 evidence.
judgment_delta: dirname(common-dir) collision was blocking; exact common-dir namespace preserves repository identity and the real Git fixture fails the prior implementation
